description: From the brand Previous page At Oxford, we give you an environmental promise. As a stationery company, we are committed to using paper from 100% sustainably managed forests. Working with SBTi, Hamelin has become one of less than 5000 companies globally with Science Based Targets and one of less than 3000 with net zero commitments. Hamelin have committed to a reduction of 29% CO2 emissions by 2030. At Oxford, quality is an obsession. The No. 1 ingredient in our notebooks is OPTIK PAPER +, a paper that won’t bleed through ink and is extremely white, and which has recently been further improved to be both thicker and less rich in wood fibers, resulting in a reduced carbon footprint. Our focus on quality means that we can provide you with a product that will enable you to succeed with confidence and reach your full potential!
